---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for AmmaXterm
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem would this feature solve? Who benefits?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about.

## Scope check

Please confirm this fits the product scope in
`docs/PRD-AmmaXterm-v0.5.md` (SSH terminal, SFTP, site management, port
forwarding). Out-of-scope items (RDP/VNC/Telnet, built-in editor, cloud
sync, etc.) are unlikely to be accepted.

## Additional context

Mockups, references, or examples.
